zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Dreux於大約1188年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊時，她的父親Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine35歲，母親Yolande de Coucy25歲。她於大約1206年與Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais在法國艾-吉洛易德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年3月17日在法國德 艾斯特姆斯可勒爾蒙吉-阿恭享年55歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆斯可勒爾蒙吉-阿恭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Dreux于大约1188年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊时，她的父亲Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine35岁，母亲Yolande de Coucy25岁。她于大约1206年与Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais在法国艾-吉洛易德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年3月17日在法国德 艾斯特姆斯可勒爾蒙吉-阿恭享年55岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特姆斯可勒爾蒙吉-阿恭。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Dreux was born about 1188, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, was 35 and her mother, Yolande de Coucy, was 25. She married Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais about 1206, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 17 March 1242, in Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Dreux est née environ 1188, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Coucy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais environ 1206, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1242, à Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Dreux um 1188 in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine 35 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Coucy 25. Sie hat um 1206 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. März 1242 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Dreux è nata il circa 1188 nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Coucy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais circa 1206, nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1242, nel Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Dreuxが約1188年にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで生まれた時，父Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braineは35歳，母Yolande de Coucyは25歳であった。約1206年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスでHugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimeraisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年3月17日にフランスグランド エストメウゼクラーモント-エン-アルゴンで55歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウゼクラーモント-エン-アルゴンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Dreux(이)가 대략 1188년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Coucy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1206년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 3월 17일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 클레몽--아르곤에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 클레몽--아르곤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Dreux nasceu aproximadamente 1188, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Coucy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais aproximadamente 1206, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1242, em Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Dreux родилась около 1188 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Coucy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais около 1206 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 17 марта 1242 г. в местности клирмонт-ен-аргонн, меус, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности клирмонт-ен-аргонн, меус, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Dreux nació aproximadamente 1188, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Yolande de Coucy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hugues IV, De Châteauneuf en Thimerais aproximadamente 1206, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1242, en Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Clermont-en-Argonne, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.
